meta.title: BarcodeGen - Professional Barcode & QR Code Generator

meta.ogTitle: BarcodeGen - Professional Barcode & QR Code Generator
meta.ogDescription: Generate professional barcodes and QR codes instantly. Free online barcode generator supporting 30+ formats.

hero.subtitle: The most powerful barcode platform. 30+ formats, instant generation, production-ready downloads. Trusted by 500K+ users worldwide.

features.title: Everything You Need
features.subtitle: Powerful tools to generate, customize, and manage barcodes and QR codes for any use case.
features.feature1Desc: Support for 30+ barcode formats including EAN, UPC, Code 128, Code 39, ITF, and more.
features.feature2Desc: Create QR codes for URLs, text, WiFi, vCards, emails, phone numbers, and more.
features.feature3Desc: Export your barcodes in PNG, SVG, PDF, and EPS formats at any resolution.
features.feature4Desc: Generate hundreds of barcodes at once with CSV upload and batch processing.
features.feature5Desc: Customize colors, sizes, fonts, and add logos to make your barcodes unique.
features.feature6Desc: Integrate barcode generation directly into your applications with our REST API.
features.feature7Desc: Start generating barcodes immediately. No signup, no login, no hassle.
features.feature8Desc: Generate barcodes on any device - desktop, tablet, or smartphone.

whyChoose.title: Why teams choose
whyChoose.subtitle: Trusted by over 500,000 users worldwide for professional barcode generation. Built for speed, quality, and reliability.
whyChoose.reason1Desc: All generated barcodes comply with international standards and are guaranteed scannable.
whyChoose.reason2Desc: Generate barcodes in milliseconds. No waiting, no queues, no processing delays.
whyChoose.reason3Desc: No daily limits, no watermarks, no restrictions. Generate as many barcodes as you need.
whyChoose.reason4Desc: Support for international formats including EAN (Europe), UPC (Americas), and JAN (Japan).
whyChoose.reason5Desc: RESTful API for seamless integration into your existing workflows and applications.
whyChoose.reason6Desc: Your data is never stored or shared. All processing happens securely in your browser.

barcodeTypes.title: 30+ Barcode Formats Supported
barcodeTypes.subtitle: From retail products to industrial logistics, we support every major barcode standard.

howItWorks.title: Four Simple Steps
howItWorks.subtitle: No registration, no software downloads. Start generating barcodes in seconds.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Select from 30+ barcode formats or 10+ QR code types to match your needs.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Input your data - product numbers, URLs, text, or any content you want to encode.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Adjust colors, size, format, and add custom branding to your barcode.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Export in high-resolution PNG, SVG, or PDF and use anywhere you need.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Quick answers to common questions about BarcodeGen.
faq.a1: Yes! BarcodeGen is completely free for basic barcode and QR code generation. No registration or payment required.
faq.q2: What barcode formats do you support?
faq.a2: We support 30+ formats including EAN-13, EAN-8, UPC-A, UPC-E, Code 128, Code 39, ITF-14, ISBN, ISSN, Data Matrix, PDF417, and many more.
faq.q3: Can I generate barcodes in bulk?
faq.a3: Absolutely! Upload a CSV file with your data and generate hundreds of barcodes at once. All formats are supported for bulk generation.
faq.q4: What file formats can I download?
faq.a4: You can download barcodes in PNG, SVG, PDF, and EPS formats. All downloads are high-resolution and print-ready.
faq.a5: Yes, we offer a REST API for developers who want to integrate barcode generation into their applications. Check our documentation for details.
faq.a6: Yes, all barcodes generated by BarcodeGen are industry-standard compliant and scannable by any barcode reader.
